---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a bug to help us improve RePen"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: "bug"
assignees: ""
---

> **Before submitting a bug report**:
> Please make sure you are running the latest version of RePen from [rehmanahmad.pro](https://rehmanahmad.pro). If you are experiencing installation or scaling issues, check our troubleshooting guides on the website first.

### Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Launch RePen
2. Click on '...'
3. Perform action '...'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

### Environment Info
* **RePen Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
* **Windows OS Version**: [e.g., Windows 10 / 11]
* **Display Resolution & Scaling**: [e.g., 1920x1080 at 125%]
* **Graphics Hardware**: [e.g., Intel HD Graphics / NVIDIA GTX]

### Additional Context
Add any other context or debug logs (you can find logs in `rep-debug.log` in the application directory) here.
